assignments.name: postContent
assignments.value:
We just launched Palisade One.

Enterprise-grade cybersecurity for small and mid-sized businesses — AI-powered EDR, 24/7 SOC monitoring, real-time SIEM — all fully managed.

Starting at $399/month. No contracts.

Free cyber risk assessment: palisadeone.com/cyber-assessment.html

#cybersecurity #MSSP #SMBsecurity

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ author: 'urn:li:organization:YOUR_ORG_ID', lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED', specificContent: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent': { shareCommentary: { text: $json.postContent }, shareMediaCategory: 'NONE' } }, visibility: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.MemberNetworkVisibility': 'PUBLIC' } }) }}

nodes.name: Post to LinkedIn
nodes.notes: IMPORTANT: Replace YOUR_ORG_ID with your LinkedIn Company Page ID. Find it in the URL when you visit your company page admin: linkedin.com/company/XXXXX/admin/
